date_notes: UNA ratification April 3 2025; Finance Minister 'good deal' statement September 2025 (R-057).
title_en: United Nurses of Alberta ratifies 20% wage increase — six months before government calls 12% offer to teachers 'a good deal'
title_fr: L'Association des infirmières ratifie une augmentation salariale de 20 %, six mois avant que le gouvernement qualifie de « bonne offre » 12 % pour les enseignants
description_en: The United Nurses of Alberta ratifies a four-year collective agreement including a 20% wage increase. Six months later, Finance Minister Horner characterizes a 12% wage offer to teachers as 'a good deal.' The contrast is documented in subsequent reporting.

relations.note: Carry-forward from related_events — confirm relation type
